title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
description: Prequel Loredeck for Yuta Okkotsu, Rika Orimoto, Tokyo Jujutsu High first-year dynamics, Suguru Geto's pre-mainline faction state, and the Night Parade climax.
author: Saga

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen 0 manga prequel material, treated as manga-primary pre-mainline context for the Jujutsu Kaisen Loredeck family.
continuity.notes: Mainline manga outcomes after the prequel should remain in later arc decks unless explicitly needed as bridge metadata.

dependencies.reason: Uses core Jujutsu Kaisen cursed energy, jujutsu society, and spoiler-gate tags and assumptions.

license.notes: For local testing. Requires human canon review before reference release.

health.notes: Initial Jujutsu Kaisen 0 scaffold passes local structural health checks; not a substitute for human canon review.
